payloadkeys.title: Status Items
payloadkeys.content: The status items for this report.

payloadkeys.title: Errors
payloadkeys.content: An array of errors for this status report.

subkeys.title: Error
subkeys.content: Error information for a status item that cannot be returned.

subkeys.title: Status Item
subkeys.content: The status item that this error pertains to.

subkeys.title: Status Reasons
subkeys.content: An array of reasons for the error.

subkeys.title: Error Code
subkeys.content: The error code for this error.

subkeys.title: Error Details
subkeys.content: A dictionary that contains further details about this error.

payloadkeys.title: Full Report
payloadkeys.content: The system sets this to `true` to indicate that the status report contains the full set of current status, and is not an incremental report. A full status report includes the full set of items in any status array item, not just the changes. Servers use this to replace their entire status for the device, rather than do an incremental update to the existing status. The system sets this to `true` when sending a "safety sync" status report, which is typically sent every 24 hours or so.
